text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: A real paper by authors including Boczar exists in *Aesthetic Surgery Journal* (2024/2025, DOI: 10.1093/asj/sjae251), but its actual title is "3D Breast Scanning in Plastic Surgery Utilizing Free iPhone LiDAR Application: Evaluation, Potential, and Limitations" — not the cited title "...utilizing free iphone lidar applications and standard consumer devices: A comparative analysis." The cited title is subtly but meaningfully different (different subtitle, "applications" vs "Application", added "standard consumer devices"), suggesting a fabricated or conflated reference rather than the real paper.
LINK: https://academic.oup.com/asj/advance-article-abstract/doi/10.1093/asj/sjae251/7941969
